steps.title: Square the conversion factor
steps.content:
The question converts area, so the linear conversion must be squared. Since $1$ mile is $1{,}760$ yards, one square mile is

$$(1{,}760)^2=3{,}097{,}600$$

square yards.

steps.title: Convert square yards
steps.content: Divide the town's area in square yards by the number of square yards in one square mile. $$\frac{11{,}646{,}976}{3{,}097{,}600}=3.76$$ The answer is C.
